faith.description: Spirituality, doubt, church culture, and the questions that don't have easy answers.

technology.description: Stray thoughts on the tools we use and the ones that use us.

personal.description: The stuff that doesn't fit neatly into a category — anger, joy, hard seasons, and the occasional breakthrough.

mind.description: Trying to make sense of things — how people think, why systems work the way they do, and what happens when they don't.

writing.description: Poems, stories, freewrites, and the occasional attempt to put something real on the page.

web-development.description: Building things for the web — code, stylesheets, accessibility, and the occasional deep rabbit hole.

culture-politics.description: Thinking out loud about America — elections, media, civil discourse, and the gaps between what we say and what we do.

people.description: The people who've shaped me — family, friends, and the communities I've been lucky enough to stumble into.

social-media-seo.description: What happens when we build our lives on platforms we don't control.

journeys.description: Places I've been, career turns I didn't expect, and the occasional road trip that changed how I see things.

memories.description: Looking back — year-end recaps, old stories, and the things that stick with you longer than they should.

visual.description: Things that caught my eye — photos, art, film, and the occasional fog-soaked morning.

music.description: What I'm listening to and why it matters to me.

design.description: The craft side of my work — branding, interfaces, design systems, and the messy process behind all of it.

reviews.description: Opinions about things I've used, watched, played, or listened to.

miscellany.description: The junk drawer. Every blog needs one.
